date_discipline: All evidence dated on or before 2026-04-29. In-window = 2026-04-15 through 2026-04-29; older context informs but does not anchor proposals. No post-2026-04-29 events used in scoring.
deterministic_baseline_source: site/src/data/indexes/*.json (per assessor instruction). User-provided baselines in prompt diverge from live data for several entities (Belgium 74.9 vs live 77.9; Singapore 73.3 vs live 62.2; Portugal 68.6 vs live 65.6; Japan 68.6 vs live 65.6; Australia 65.5 vs live 62.5; United States 35.5 vs live 25.0). Used live per assessor protocol; flagged in respective proposals.

results.key_finding: SEVENTH consecutive deferral. UNMISS mandate expires April 30 (T-1 day). What's In Blue April 28 entry covers Peacekeeping liquidity consultations only; no UNMISS renewal vote retrievable. Hard-deadline protocol final-cycle escalation; PENDING_CHANGES.md emergency human-review marker required for April 30 morning.

Mythos Preview Discord-group breach (April 21 Bloomberg/TechCrunch report) is most significant new SYS/ACC negative signal — 14-hour breach via guessable URL + improperly-scoped vendor credentials. Offset by voluntary too-dangerous-to-release designation (positive AWR/INT) and April 22 DC Circuit filing reinforcing INT/ACC. Sub-5pt net effect; composite 61.6 holds.

Trial Day 3 procedural — Musk cross-examination, Birchall next. Two surviving claims (unjust enrichment, breach of charitable trust); ~$134B sought. Verdict ~3 weeks out. SB3444 committee outcome April 24 still unconfirmed in retrievable sources. Post-verdict re-queue mandatory. Composite 27.5 holds.

Karp 'technofascism' 22-point manifesto (32M views) + Wired Slack employee-ethics rupture + UK Parliament 'dreadful'/'shameful' floor characterization + Met Police probe of Palantir-flagged officers. Qualitatively distinct evidence but composite 6.6 cannot register further movement. Methodology-note candidate.
Hard-floor confirmation. No acute April 25-29 net-new evidence beyond prior cycle absorption. Continuing accumulation pattern. Methodology-note candidate; floor-limitation gap overdue 8 nights.

Year-4 anniversary (April 15) anchored extensive in-window reporting. April 27 el-Fasher RSF detention (1,470+ civilians, 907 military, 20 doctors). $3B aid plan critically underfunded. Floor-limitation methodology gap continues.

37 NGO license non-renewals + aid -37% Jan-Mar + UN famine confirmation + 1/3 health facilities at closure threat. April 28 UNSC Gaza ceasefire briefing. Partial mitigation: Zikim Crossing aid surge. Composite 8.8 holds at near-floor.
April 23 voluntary buyout (~7%/8,750 employees) absorbed in April 28 confirmation. No new April 24-29 net evidence. Anti-double-counting rule applied. Composite 66.4 holds.
April 23 10% layoff (~8,000 employees, May 20 effective) absorbed in April 28 confirmation. No new April 24-29 net evidence. Anti-double-counting rule applied. Composite 29.4 holds.
April 22 13-4 vote was the basis for April 27 rebaseline at 35.2. Civil rights 'backdoor repeal' framing already absorbed. Anti-double-counting rule applied. Composite 35.2 holds.

April 20 WARN Act + April 21 NELP Flex brief documented; April 20 CA AG price-inflation evidence absorbed yesterday. Composite 17.8 already deeply Critical. No threshold-crossing event. Composite holds.
Abbott $114M Houston coercion + HRW Operation Metro Surge context + Amnesty Texas-specific concerns. Composite 14.1 already deeply Critical with EQU/ACC/INT at 1.3 sub-band ceiling. Composite holds.
No new acute April 24-29 evidence beyond April 17 FSF v3 absorbed yesterday. Sector AI labor cascade contextual only. Composite 65.0 holds.

Amnesty April 2026 World Report documents migrant clampdown including practices amounting to torture/enforced disappearance. HRW Operation Metro Surge unlawful deaths. Composite 25 already deeply reflects accumulated evidence.

HRW Operation Metro Surge unlawful deaths attributed to FEDERAL actors, not state government. State EQU at 3.8 already reflects federal-context vulnerability. Per attribution methodology, composite 84.4 holds.
First agent assessment. Stable democracy, broadly respected liberties. 2023 'rioter' law concern, historical xenophobia. Composite 77.9 holds.
OHCHR April 2026 alarm at drug-execution increase + April 16 hanging + 8 drug executions YTD. Tied-visa migrant system. Composite 62.2 holds.
March 2026 Council of Europe Roma inclusion deficit + dissolution of Roma Advisory Group/Observatory. Late 2025/early 2026 immigration overhaul. Composite 65.6 holds.
Death penalty regime + 1.5% refugee recognition rate + new migrant-worker framework with vague conditions. June 2025 abolition of intern program is positive structural reform. Composite 65.6 holds.

January 26 2026 UN Human Rights Council review — 40 countries called for criminal-responsibility age increase. UN Working Group 'human rights crises' framing. Victoria treaty (positive). Composite 62.5 holds.

methodology_flags.description: SEVENTH CONSECUTIVE DEFERRAL. UNMISS mandate expires April 30, 2026 (TOMORROW). Final pre-deadline scan returns no confirmed renewal vote. PENDING_CHANGES.md emergency human-review marker mandatory for April 30 morning re-check. Methodology-note registration required regardless of vote outcome — floor-limitation prevents composite expression.

Five entities at or near floor (xAI 2.2, Palantir 6.6, Sudan 0, South Sudan 0, Israel 8.8) with accumulating new evidence each night. Methodology gap now overdue 8 cumulative nights. Recommend dedicated methodology-development cycle: (a) permanent-floor designation framework, (b) cumulative-evidence-tier weighting, or (c) sub-score for harm-scale beyond 0-100 dimensional scale.

User-provided baselines in tonight's prompt diverge from live site/data for 6 entities: Belgium 74.9 vs 77.9; Singapore 73.3 vs 62.2; Portugal 68.6 vs 65.6; Japan 68.6 vs 65.6; Australia 65.5 vs 62.5; United States 35.5 vs 25.0. Used live per assessor protocol. Recommend reconciliation pass before next rotation cycle.

Anti-double-counting rule applied for Microsoft (April 23 buyout), Meta AI (April 23 layoff), Houston (April 22 ICE vote — already absorbed in April 27 rebaseline), Amazon (April 20 CA AG evidence — already absorbed yesterday).

south_sudan_resolution: DEFERRED (7th consecutive). Final pre-deadline retrieval attempted via Security Council Report What's In Blue (most recent April 28 entry covers UN Peacekeeping liquidity consultations only; last UNMISS-specific entry April 16 routine briefing); press.un.org collection page returned 404; specific search confirms no April 2026 UNMISS renewal release. 2025 cycle precedent: technical rollover Res 2778 on April 30, substantive Res 2779 May 8. Same pattern remains plausible. Floor-limitation means any vote outcome (full renewal / technical rollover / scope reduction / mandate lapse) cannot be expressed via composite movement under current methodology. HARD-DEADLINE PROTOCOL IS NOW AT FINAL CYCLE — PENDING_CHANGES.md emergency human-review marker mandatory for April 30 morning re-check; methodology-note registration required regardless of outcome.
key_findings: Zero standard proposals generated tonight. Today's window did not produce evidence crossing the 5-point composite threshold for any entity at the live baseline.
Five floor-limited confirmations + South Sudan deferral — methodology gap continues to accumulate evidence the system cannot express.

Anthropic Mythos Preview Discord-group breach (April 21) is the night's most significant new SYS/ACC NEGATIVE signal — 14-hour breach via guessable URL + improperly-scoped vendor credentials. Offset by voluntary too-dangerous-to-release classification (positive AWR/INT) and DC Circuit filing — sub-5pt net effect.

Singapore April 2026 OHCHR statement on drug-execution moratorium following April 16 hanging is the night's most significant new ROTATION-cycle negative signal — already reflected in INT 2.8 (lowest dimension).

Australia January 26 2026 UN HRC review with 40-country call to raise criminal-responsibility age + UN Working Group 'human rights crises' framing reflects sustained rotation-cycle negative pattern; partially offset by Victoria treaty.
Anti-double-counting rule properly applied for Microsoft, Meta AI, Houston, Amazon — preventing duplicate proposal generation against same evidence.
User-input baseline drift identified for 6 entities; recommended reconciliation pass before next rotation cycle.
South Sudan UNMISS hard-deadline protocol now at FINAL CYCLE (T-1 day) — PENDING_CHANGES.md emergency marker required.
